author: Jane Smith
description: Provides high-level pipetting helpers for the ML600 syringe pump, including volume tracking and error recovery routines.
_comment_paths: All paths below are relative to the directory containing this spec file.
_comment_default_help: Optional: when multiple CHM help files are included, specify which one opens by default when the user clicks Help on the library card.
_comment_installer: Optional: bundle a standalone setup .exe so users can access the original installer from the package.
